name: WpfComponentCatalog
summary: The WpfComponentCatalog class represents a group of controls to select components using the component catalog.

constructors.name: WpfComponentCatalog
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the WpfComponentCatalog class.

properties.name: ButtonHeight
properties.summary: Gets and sets the height of the button control.

properties.name: ButtonText
properties.summary: Gets and sets the text of the button control.

properties.name: ButtonWidth
properties.summary: Gets and sets the width of the button control.

properties.name: SelectedName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the selected component name in the control.

properties.name: SelectedNumber
properties.summary: Gets or sets the selected component number in the control.

events.name: SelectClicked
events.summary: The SelectClicked event is raised when the Select button is clicked.

events.name: SelectionDone
events.summary: The SelectionDone event is raised when the selection has been done.
